---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability for AgentGuard MCP
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: tlancas25
---

## Summary

A clear description of the feature you're requesting.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How would you implement this? What should the behavior be?

## NIST Control Relevance (if applicable)

If this feature relates to a NIST 800-53 Rev 5 or AI RMF control, which one?
Describe how the feature would implement or support the control.

## Use Case

What specific use case does this enable? Federal deployment? Dev workflow? Both?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better?

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples that would help understand the request.

---

**Priority guidance:**
- NIST control implementations are high priority
- Attack pattern additions are high priority
- New MCP client integrations are medium priority
- Performance improvements are low priority unless they impact federal deployments
